name: create-readme
description: 'Create a README.md file for the project'
---

# README Creation

Create a comprehensive and well-structured README.md file for your project that serves as the primary entry point for users, developers, and contributors.

## Key Elements

- Clear project title and description
- Technology stack overview
- Quick start / getting started section
- Installation instructions
- Usage examples
- Project structure overview
- Development workflow
- Contributing guidelines
- License information
- Links to detailed documentation

## Best Practices

- Use clear, concise language
- Include code examples where helpful
- Provide quick wins for new users
- Reference detailed documentation in other files
- Maintain consistency with project style
- Use proper Markdown formatting
- Include badges for build status, version, etc.
- Optimize for scanning (use headings effectively)

## When to Use

- Creating a new project README
- Refreshing documentation for better clarity
- Adding comprehensive developer information
- Standardizing README structure
